title: Soul Pearl
description: Adds a Soul Pearl that can capture the essence of another mob and teleport it.
body:
# Soul Pearl
Adds a Soul Pearl that can capture the essence of another mob and teleport it.

Adds a game rule to enable/disable survival players capturing each others' essence. Even with the restriction enabled:
- Creative players can always capture essences of any player
- Any player can still capture their own essence by crouching and right clicking the air, and give their essence to another player of their own volition

<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9O8chWbvBKI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Dependencies
Requires the Fabric API

## Source
https://github.com/wknowleskellett/Soul-Pearl

## Credit
Code and assets are mine, William Knowles-Kellett. Feel free to modify and republish in a modpack.
